content: BP demonstrates strong disclosure practices for Employee Health & Safety, with quantified reporting of process safety events showing year-over-year improvement (27 tier 1 and 2 events in 2024 versus 38 previously). However, talent signals suggest moderate concerns, with workforce sentiment data indicating below-average perceptions of safety culture despite adequate sample confidence. With only two of five evidence streams active, this assessment should be interpreted cautiously; regulatory, monetary commitment, and supply chain dimensions remain unmeasured rather than indicating poor performance.
